findings.message: CLAUDE.md lacks YAML frontmatter; name and description fields are absent, making the file non-machine-readable by NLPM scanners
No worked invocation examples showing user prompt to expected Claude behavior; each skill is described in prose only
Skill descriptions in CLAUDE.md are one-sentence summaries rather than behavioral specifications; standalone file is under-informative without the skill files
Vague quantifier 'relevant' at 'always suggest what's relevant' with no criteria defining what qualifies as relevant for a given tech stack
